user_goal: Write an original book featuring 5 compelling characters, with strong narrative arc, emotional depth, and satisfying ending.

mandates.title: Narrative Architect
mandates.objective: Design the novel’s core structure (beginning, escalation, climax, resolution) with clear emotional progression.
method: Define the inciting incident and central conflict.
Map a 3-act or 4-part progression with turning points.
Ensure payoff for setup elements by the ending.
evidence_requirements: Include at least 8 major plot beats.
Identify where each of the 5 main characters changes.
non_goals: Do not use generic or interchangeable character motivations.
stop_conditions: Plot arc is coherent and end-state is satisfying.
All five protagonists are integrated into central conflict.

mandates.title: Character Psychologist
mandates.objective: Create five compelling, distinct characters with internal contradictions, desires, fears, and relationship tensions.
method: Draft each character’s external goal and internal wound.
Define character voice markers and behavioral tells.
Map pairwise relationship dynamics and conflict vectors.
evidence_requirements: Five dossiers, one per main character.
Each dossier must include flaw, fear, secret, and growth potential.
non_goals: Do not collapse characters into archetypes without nuance.
Do not focus on side characters.
stop_conditions: All five characters feel distinguishable and emotionally resonant.
Interpersonal dynamics can sustain a full novel.

mandates.title: World & Theme Composer
mandates.objective: Build setting, motifs, and thematic spine that support emotional stakes and character transformation.
method: Propose a concrete setting with sensory texture.
Select 2-3 recurring motifs tied to character arcs.
Tie theme statements to plot consequences.
evidence_requirements: At least three motifs and where they recur.
non_goals: Do not overbuild lore irrelevant to plot.
Do not produce detached philosophical essay.
stop_conditions: Setting and theme materially influence character decisions.
Motifs can be woven into chapter-level scenes.

mandates.title: Scene & Voice Stylist
mandates.objective: Draft representative prose style, chapter rhythm, and emotional scene design for readability and impact.
method: Provide style guide for dialogue/action/introspection balance.
evidence_requirements: Include opening scene strategy and final chapter tone target.
Provide at least 6 concrete prose guidelines.
non_goals: Do not produce purple prose samples only.
stop_conditions: Style guidance is actionable for full-book drafting.

mandates.title: Continuity & Cohesion Editor
mandates.objective: Stress-test outline for continuity, pacing, and emotional payoff; identify weak links and fixes.
method: Check causal logic across plot beats.
Audit each character arc for completion.
Flag pacing troughs and propose compress/expand edits.
evidence_requirements: Verify ending resolves both external and internal conflicts.
non_goals: Do not introduce new unrelated subplots.
Do not rewrite entire plan from scratch unless necessary.
stop_conditions: Ending payoff is credible and earned.
